title: Alexandria: Solid Q1 Results, FFO Growth Guided At 8%+
text: Alexandria delivered another strong quarter and gave some examples that prove that there is a huge difference between its iconic class A, well located properties, and commodity office. The company also put strong guidance out for 2022, with FFO growing 8% at the midpoint.

title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) Management on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE:ARE ) Q1 2022 Results Conference Call April 26, 2022 3:00 PM ET Company Participants Paula Schwartz - SVP, IR Joel Marcus - Executive Chairman, Founder Peter Moglia - Co-CEO Stephen Richardson - Co-CEO Dean Shigenaga - CFO Conference Call Participants Jamie Feldman - Bank of America Sheila McGrath - Evercore Manny Korchman - Citi Rich Anderson - SMBC Dave Rodgers - Baird Michael Carroll - RBC Capital Markets Daniel Ismail - Green Street Advisors Anthony Paolone - JPMorgan Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Alexandria Real Estate Equities First Quarter 2022 Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] Please note, this event is being recorded.

title: Alexandria (ARE) Q1 FFO Beats Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Alexandria Real Estate's (ARE) reports better-than-anticipated first-quarter 2022 performance attributable to healthy leasing activity and solid internal growth.

title: 3 REITs That Prove Slow and Steady Wins the Race
text: Two decades of market-beating returns from offices, stores, and warehouses.

title: Here's an Absolutely Brilliant Way to Earn Passive Income
text: These real estate stocks let the dividends do the driving.
